inv.rationale: The interactive charts effectively respond to user actions and include useful annotations that highlight important data points, stimulating interaction and curiosity. However, slight improvements in narrative support directing interactions could enhance engagement further.

The narrative clearly communicates the overarching trends, explaining mortality rates across disaster types. Reliable and cited data add value though citation of individual data sources directly in visualizations would be helpful.

Text and visuals are generally clear and well-designed with consistent fonts and color usage. Headings guide users through a logical flow. However, some visual details risk being missed due to narrow intervals on the axis labels of some charts.

The logical layout with a clear sequence, ample white space, aligned elements and responsive features contribute to an enjoyable viewing experience, although mobile interactions need some refinement for perfect responsiveness.

Visually appealing with a cohesive color palette and effective elements. Typeface maintains readability but feels too standard; lacks distinctive styling. Animations present are limited but ensure non-distractive interface appearance. Additionally, inclusion of significantly interactive transitions or richer observations would have elevated scores here.
